purpose: Convert experimental evidence into a reviewer-legible chain from protocol to result to interpretation.

fixed_routines.name: Setup-first protocol
fixed_routines.risk: Missing implementation details makes gains look non-reproducible.

fixed_routines.name: Claim-evidence alignment
fixed_routines.risk: Overclaiming if a claim is not backed by an explicit result.

fixed_routines.name: Ablation staircase
fixed_routines.risk: Ablation without rationale reads like parameter fishing.

fixed_routines.name: Fair comparison block
fixed_routines.risk: Reviewers will attack unfair or under-specified baselines.
